name: belay-harness
description: Belay — the always-on goal loop for Claude Code: a Stop hook that keeps the agent working (feeds rope) while its focused Keyoku goal is unconverged and budget allows, plus a PreToolUse fall-arrest gate (autonomy x budget x action-class). Reads Keyoku and tokenroom state files; never spawns their processes. Command/bin: belay. npm package: belay-harness (bare 'belay' is taken).
